generations.label: W205
generations.common_competitors: BMW 3 Series, Audi A4, Lexus IS

known_issues.title: Balance shaft gear failure (M274 engine)
known_issues.description: The composite gear on the balance shaft of the M274 2.0L turbo four-cylinder can wear and shed teeth, allowing the balance shaft timing chain to skip and disrupt engine timing.
known_issues.symptoms: A rattling or ticking noise from the front of the engine on cold start, stored misfire or camshaft/crankshaft correlation fault codes, and in advanced cases a sudden loss of power or engine failure.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask for service records showing a balance shaft gear inspection or replacement, and listen closely for a rattle in the first few seconds after a cold start.

known_issues.title: Air suspension (AIRMATIC) leaks
known_issues.description: On AIRMATIC-equipped cars, the air struts, air lines, and compressor degrade over time and develop slow leaks, causing the vehicle to sag or ride unevenly.
known_issues.symptoms: The car sitting noticeably lower after sitting overnight, a suspension warning message on the dash, and the air compressor running loudly or continuously trying to maintain ride height.
known_issues.recommendation: Check ride height first thing in the morning versus after a drive, and listen for excessive compressor cycling with the engine off.

known_issues.title: 9G-Tronic transmission hesitation
known_issues.description: The 9-speed automatic can develop harsh or delayed shifts at low speed as valve body seals and adaptive shift logic wear, particularly noticeable in stop-and-go traffic.
known_issues.symptoms: A pause or clunk when shifting from Park to Drive or Reverse, hesitation pulling away from a stop, and occasional harsh 1-2 upshifts.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive through stop-and-go traffic with both a cold and fully warmed-up transmission, feeling for harsh or delayed shifts.

known_issues.title: Valve cover and oil filter housing gasket leaks
known_issues.description: The plastic valve cover and oil filter housing gaskets on the M274 engine harden with age and begin seeping oil.
known_issues.symptoms: A burning oil smell, oil residue on the engine block and starter, and a gradually dropping oil level between changes.
known_issues.recommendation: Inspect the top and underside of the engine for oil residue and confirm the oil level is where it should be.

generations.label: W204
generations.common_competitors: BMW 3 Series (E90), Audi A4 (B8), Lexus IS

known_issues.title: Balance shaft timing chain tensioner wear
known_issues.description: The M272/M273 V6 engines use a balance shaft timing chain and tensioner that wear prematurely, allowing chain slap and, in advanced cases, jumped timing.
known_issues.symptoms: A rattling noise from the front of the engine for the first few seconds after a cold start, stored camshaft position fault codes, and occasionally rough idle or a check engine light.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen carefully for a cold-start rattle and ask whether the timing chain tensioner update or replacement has been performed.

known_issues.title: Wiring harness insulation degradation
known_issues.description: Certain wiring harnesses from this era used an environmentally friendly insulation that can crack and corrode with moisture exposure, causing intermittent electrical faults.
known_issues.symptoms: Intermittent warning lights (ABS, ESP, airbag) with no real underlying fault, power windows or mirrors working sporadically, and in rare cases stalling or a no-start condition.
known_issues.recommendation: Scan for stored electrical fault codes and test every power accessory (windows, mirrors, seats) during the inspection.

known_issues.title: Rear subframe and wheel arch rust
known_issues.description: Rear subframe mounting points and wheel arches are prone to corrosion in salt-belt climates, which can compromise structural integrity if left unaddressed.
known_issues.symptoms: Bubbling paint or visible rust on the rear wheel arches and rocker panels, and flaking or scaled rust on the rear subframe when viewed from underneath.
known_issues.recommendation: Have the rear subframe and wheel arches inspected on a lift, especially on cars from salt-belt regions.

known_issues.title: AC compressor failure
known_issues.description: The AC compressor clutch and evaporator are common failure points across the W204 lineup.
known_issues.symptoms: Warm air from the vents, a clicking or grinding noise from the compressor, and visible refrigerant oil residue near the compressor.
known_issues.recommendation: Run the AC on maximum cold for at least 10 minutes to confirm it holds a consistent temperature.

maintenance_items.name: Balance shaft timing chain tensioner inspection

generations.label: W213
generations.common_competitors: BMW 5 Series, Audi A6, Lexus ES

known_issues.title: Air suspension (AIRMATIC) leaks
known_issues.description: Air struts, air supply lines, and the compressor are prone to leaks over time, causing the vehicle to sag or ride unevenly, especially at the rear.
known_issues.symptoms: The car sitting visibly lower after sitting overnight, a 'Visit Workshop - Suspension Malfunction' message, and the compressor running loudly or almost continuously trying to hold ride height.
known_issues.recommendation: Check ride height cold in the morning versus after driving, and have the suspension system scanned for stored fault codes before buying.

known_issues.title: Balance shaft gear failure (M264/M274 engine)
known_issues.description: The four-cylinder turbo engines share the composite balance shaft gear design that can wear and shed teeth, disrupting timing chain operation.
known_issues.symptoms: A rattle from the front of the engine on cold start, stored misfire or camshaft correlation codes, and in severe cases sudden loss of power.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask for service history related to balance shaft or timing chain work and listen for a cold-start rattle.

known_issues.title: Electric auxiliary water pump failure
known_issues.description: Turbocharged models use an electric auxiliary coolant pump to manage heat soak after shutdown; this pump commonly wears out and fails.
known_issues.symptoms: A coolant temperature warning light, occasional overheating messages after highway driving, and a whining or grinding noise from the pump with the engine off but the key on.
known_issues.recommendation: Check the coolant level and listen for auxiliary pump noise with the ignition on and engine off.

known_issues.title: 9G-Tronic transmission hesitation
known_issues.description: The 9-speed automatic can develop harsh or delayed shifts at low speed, particularly noticeable pulling away from a stop or in slow traffic.
known_issues.symptoms: A pause or clunk shifting into Drive or Reverse, hesitation from a standstill, and occasional harsh low-speed upshifts.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive through stop-and-go traffic with both a cold and fully warmed transmission.

generations.label: W212
generations.common_competitors: BMW 5 Series (F10), Audi A6 (C7), Lexus GS

known_issues.title: Air suspension (AIRMATIC) compressor and strut failure
known_issues.description: The AIRMATIC compressor and air struts are common failure points on this generation, leading to sagging or uneven ride height.
known_issues.symptoms: The car leaning to one side or squatting at the rear, the compressor running constantly or making a loud grinding noise, and a suspension warning message on the dash.
known_issues.recommendation: Check ride height on level ground first thing in the morning and listen for excessive compressor cycling.

known_issues.title: Balance shaft gear / timing chain wear (V6 engine)
known_issues.description: The M272/M276 V6 engines share the balance shaft gear and timing chain design prone to wear and, eventually, chain skip.
known_issues.symptoms: A rattle from the front of the engine on cold start, stored camshaft or crankshaft correlation codes, and occasionally rough idle.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen for a cold-start rattle and ask for records of any timing chain related repairs.

known_issues.title: Trunk lid and rear fender rust
known_issues.description: Certain early production examples are prone to premature rust bubbling around the trunk lid seams and rear wheel arches, which was the subject of a Mercedes-Benz corrosion goodwill program in some markets.
known_issues.symptoms: Bubbling paint or visible rust spots along the trunk lid edges and rear fenders, most noticeable near seams and drain points.
known_issues.recommendation: Inspect the trunk lid seams and rear fenders closely for bubbling paint, and ask if the vehicle was covered under Mercedes' corrosion goodwill program.

known_issues.title: SAM control module failures
known_issues.description: The front and rear Signal Acquisition Modules (SAM), which manage electrical distribution, can fail and cause a cascade of unrelated electrical faults.
known_issues.symptoms: Multiple simultaneous warning lights across unrelated systems (ABS, airbag, lighting), power windows or mirrors not responding, and in some cases a no-start condition.
known_issues.recommendation: Check for multiple unrelated warning lights at once and test all power accessories.

generations.label: X253
generations.common_competitors: BMW X3, Audi Q5, Lexus NX

known_issues.title: Balance shaft gear failure (M274 engine)
known_issues.description: The four-cylinder turbo engine shares the composite balance shaft gear design that can wear and shed teeth, disrupting the timing chain.
known_issues.symptoms: A rattling noise from the front of the engine on cold start, stored misfire or camshaft correlation fault codes, and in advanced cases sudden loss of power.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask for service records showing balance shaft or timing chain work and listen for a cold-start rattle.

known_issues.title: Air suspension (AIR BODY CONTROL) leaks
known_issues.description: On models with the optional air suspension, the air struts and compressor lines are prone to leaks that develop over time.
known_issues.symptoms: The vehicle sitting noticeably lower on one corner or overall after sitting overnight, and a suspension warning message on the dash.
known_issues.recommendation: Check ride height cold in the morning and listen for the compressor running excessively.

known_issues.title: 9G-Tronic transmission hesitation
known_issues.description: The 9-speed automatic can develop harsh or delayed shifts at low speed as it ages.
known_issues.symptoms: A pause or clunk shifting into Drive or Reverse, and hesitation pulling away from a stop.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive through stop-and-go traffic, feeling for harsh or delayed shifts.

known_issues.title: Panoramic sunroof drain clogging
known_issues.description: Sunroof drain tubes can clog with leaves and debris, causing water to back up and leak into the cabin around the headliner and footwells.
known_issues.symptoms: A musty odor inside the cabin, water stains on the headliner, damp carpet after rain, and occasionally electrical faults from water reaching control modules under the seats.
known_issues.recommendation: Check for a musty smell and feel the carpet and footwells for dampness, especially after rain.

generations.label: W167
generations.common_competitors: BMW X5, Audi Q7, Volvo XC90

known_issues.title: E-ACTIVE BODY CONTROL / air suspension faults
known_issues.description: The advanced air suspension system standard on higher trims can develop air strut or compressor leaks, and the active roll-control hydraulic components can also weep fluid over time.
known_issues.symptoms: Uneven ride height, a suspension warning message on the dash, and clunking or knocking over bumps from the active roll control hardware.
known_issues.recommendation: Have the suspension system scanned for fault history and check that ride height is even and consistent.

known_issues.title: 48V mild hybrid (EQBoost) system faults
known_issues.description: The integrated starter-generator and 48V battery pack used for the mild-hybrid system can develop faults that disable the stop-start and torque-boost functions.
known_issues.symptoms: A message that stop-start is temporarily disabled, a reduced power warning, and a hybrid system fault light on the instrument cluster.
known_issues.recommendation: Confirm stop-start engages normally at idle and check for stored hybrid system fault codes.

known_issues.title: MBUX infotainment glitches
known_issues.description: The MBUX infotainment system and digital instrument cluster can freeze, reboot, or drop connectivity, usually resolved with a software update.
known_issues.symptoms: The touchscreen freezing or going black momentarily, delayed response to touch or voice commands, and Bluetooth or Apple CarPlay disconnecting unexpectedly.
known_issues.recommendation: Test the touchscreen, voice control, and phone pairing thoroughly during the test drive.

known_issues.title: 9G-Tronic transmission hesitation
known_issues.description: The 9-speed automatic can develop harsh or delayed shifts at low speed as it ages.
known_issues.symptoms: A pause or clunk shifting into Drive or Reverse, and hesitation pulling away from a stop in slow traffic.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive through stop-and-go traffic, feeling for harsh or delayed shifts.

generations.label: W166
generations.common_competitors: BMW X5, Audi Q7, Acura MDX

known_issues.title: Air suspension (AIRMATIC) failure
known_issues.description: The air struts and compressor commonly fail on this generation, causing the vehicle to sag or ride unevenly, with rear struts failing most often.
known_issues.symptoms: The rear end sagging noticeably at rest, the compressor running excessively or failing to build pressure, and a 'Suspension malfunction, visit workshop' message on the dash.
known_issues.recommendation: Check ride height cold in the morning and after driving, and have the suspension system scanned for fault codes before buying.

known_issues.title: Balance shaft gear / timing chain wear (V6 engine)
known_issues.description: The V6 engines used across this generation share a balance shaft gear and timing chain design prone to wear over time.
known_issues.symptoms: A rattle from the front of the engine on cold start, stored camshaft or crankshaft correlation codes, and occasionally rough idle.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen for a cold-start rattle and ask about any prior timing chain related repairs.

known_issues.title: 4MATIC transfer case actuator fault
known_issues.description: The electronically controlled transfer case can develop actuator motor faults, causing improper engagement between drive modes.
known_issues.symptoms: An AWD or 4MATIC warning light, a clunking noise from the drivetrain during tight turns, and occasionally a reduced power message.
known_issues.recommendation: Check for AWD warning lights and listen for unusual drivetrain noises while turning at low speed.

known_issues.title: SAM control module faults
known_issues.description: The Signal Acquisition Modules that manage electrical distribution can develop faults, causing a cascade of unrelated electrical issues.
known_issues.symptoms: Multiple unrelated warning lights appearing together, power windows or mirrors intermittently unresponsive, and occasional dashboard display glitches.
known_issues.recommendation: Check for multiple simultaneous warning lights and test all power accessories.
